summary: Frontend-only testing of LaunchPath LPOS v1.0 portal redesign features including SignalMonitor, portal header/sidebar updates, and REACHTeaserSection on homepage.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: 'GRADE B' string check failed in page_content because React JSX renders `GRADE {grade.letter}` with an HTML comment node between the text and expression (<!-- -->B), making substring search fail. Visually confirmed gauge shows grade info correctly. No fix needed.
Note: auth_testing.md shows cookie name 'session_token' but review_request mentioned 'session_id'. The correct cookie name is 'session_token' per backend code.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test session sess_paid_1773353168
context_for_next_testing_agent: All portal redesign features verified working: SYSTEM_STATUS_MONITOR header, LPOS v1.0 label, IMPLEMENTATION SEQUENCE sidebar, SignalMonitor with circular gauge (61%), ADMINISTRATIVE_HEALTH_MONITOR header, DOC_INTEGRITY/SYS_PULSE/REG_ALIGNMENT indicator bars, SIGNAL: 61% badge. REACHTeaserSection on homepage with all 5 REACH pillars (R,E,A,C,H) and CTA linking to /reach-assessment all working. Named export fix for REACHTeaserSection persists. Portal auth requires cookie name 'session_token' (not 'session_id').

test_results.signal_monitor_GRADE_B_label: VISUAL_PASS - code confirmed, substring search false-negative due to React JSX comment node
